steps.title: Complete the first item
steps.content: The sentence lists actions Pura Belpre took: offered storytelling, celebrated a holiday, and put on puppet shows. The blank must finish the description "an uncommon practice at the time" before the list moves to the next action.

steps.title: Separate the list actions
steps.content: Choice A, Choice C, and Choice D use commas where the sentence needs a stronger break between long list items. The remaining choice keeps "practice at the time" intact and uses a semicolon before "celebrated." The answer is B.
